guidance.en: This records the court's order for legal custody. Joint legal custody means both parents share decision-making. Sole legal custody means one parent makes all major decisions.
guidance.es: Esto registra la orden del tribunal para la custodia legal.

guidance.en: This records the court's order for physical custody — where the child will primarily live.
guidance.es: Esto registra la orden del tribunal para la custodia física.

guidance.en: The detailed visitation schedule ordered by the court. This should include: regular weekly schedule, holiday schedule (specific dates), summer/vacation schedule, transportation arrangements.
guidance.es: El horario de visitación detallado ordenado por el tribunal.

guidance.en: If supervised visitation is ordered, specify: who will supervise, where visits occur, duration and frequency, any costs and who pays.
